title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid
jsonLd.description:
IndiGrid, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
